summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. It opens with a split screen of a studio interviewee in a suit, identified by caption as the DHS Secretary, beside street footage of a man speaking at a cluster of news microphones, with a lower-third reading TOM STEYER: "ICE IS A CRIMINAL ORGANIZATION". The footage cuts to the same man speaking with a microphone at a campaign-style event in front of an AFSCME backdrop, then to the studio interviewee. Lower-thirds read TOM STEYER: AS GOVERNOR, I'LL PROSECUTE ICE.

script.scene: A split screen shows a studio interviewee and street footage of a man at news microphones; lower-third reads TOM STEYER: ICE IS A CRIMINAL ORGANIZATION.
A man speaks with a microphone at an event in front of an AFSCME backdrop; lower-third reads TOM STEYER: AS GOVERNOR, I'LL PROSECUTE ICE.
The studio interviewee speaks; the lower-third continues.

notable_text: FOX NEWS; INGRAHAM ANGLE; TOM STEYER: "ICE IS A CRIMINAL ORGANIZATION"; TOM STEYER: AS GOVERNOR, I'LL PROSECUTE ICE; MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY; WASHINGTON, DC
